obligations: Establishment of a Bootlegger Coffee Company business
Payment of upfront license fee and franchise fees
summary: This franchise agreement is between Bootlegger Franchise Company Proprietary Limited and LOTRIET INVESTMENTS (PTY) LTD, where the franchisor licenses the use of the Bootlegger Coffee Company business system to the franchisee. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions of the franchise, including obligations, financial terms, and key dates.
